name: 19" Christmas Flocked Tree Round White Base - Wondershop™
description:
This 19-Inch Flocked Tree Round White Base from Wondershop™ instantly infuses wintry holiday vibes into your seasonal decor. Standing on a crisp white round base, this artificial Christmas tree is designed like a green balsam fir tree with a flocked finish, blending gorgeous greenery with the look of freshly fallen snow. Display it on the mantel, console table, or as a centerpiece on your dining table to instantly spruce up your space with festive magic.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
